message:
feat(tui): overhaul dashboard layout, focus outline clipping, and rendering robustness

This commit contains a broad set of TUI rendering improvements spanning
the dashboard, focus outline system, tab bar, analytics, threads, and
timeline screens.

## Dashboard layout compaction and smart panel visibility

- Reduce summary_band_height from 3 to 2 rows (non-tiny terminals),
  anomaly_rail_height by 1 row across all size classes, reclaiming
  vertical space for the primary event log.
- Remove the always-visible title band ("Agent Mail Dashboard") across
  all terminal classes — the tab bar already identifies the screen.
- Hide footer bar on Compact and Normal terminals (was always 1 row);
  now only shown on Wide/UltraWide where there is room.
- Make the bottom rail (preview/query/activity) conditionally visible:
  it is only rendered when there is actual content (a quick-query string
  or a recent message preview), preventing an empty reserved panel from
  wasting space.
- Add `should_render_trend_panel()` and `should_render_bottom_rail()`
  predicate methods so layout decisions are driven by content presence
  rather than static configuration.
- Adjust trend panel width ratios downward (0.35->0.28 on Wide,
  0.40->0.30 on UltraWide) to give more room to the primary event log.
- Scale console log panel size dynamically based on line count (small,
  medium, large thresholds at 20 and 80 lines).
- `main_content_layout()` now accepts `show_footer_panel`,
  `rich_footer_content`, and `console_log_lines` parameters for
  data-driven layout decisions.

## Empty state guidance in the event log

- When the event log has zero entries, render contextual guidance text
  instead of blank space:
  - "No events yet." with "Waiting for HTTP/tool/message traffic..."
    when filter is All.
  - "No events match current filter." with "Press 1 for All..." when
    a quick-filter is active.
- This helps new users understand the dashboard is working and waiting
  for traffic, rather than appearing broken.

## Bottom rail split layout for query-only mode

- When a query is active but no message preview exists, render a
  side-by-side split (query matches + recent activity) on wide terminals
  (>=96 cols, >=8 rows) or query matches alone on smaller terminals.

## Query input visibility improvement

- The search/query input row in the primary cluster is now hidden (0
  height) when the query is inactive AND empty, reclaiming another row
  for the event log in the common idle state.

## Focus outline bounds-aware clipping

- `render_panel_focus_outline()` now takes a `bounds: Rect` parameter
  representing the parent content area. The outline is drawn OUTSIDE the
  focused panel (1 cell outward) but only on edges where space exists
  within bounds. Edges that abut the bounds boundary are omitted.
- This prevents the focus outline from overwriting content in adjacent
  panels or drawing outside the visible content area.
- Corners are only drawn where both adjacent edges have space.
- Added unit test `panel_focus_outline_is_clipped_to_content_bounds`
  verifying the outline respects bounds and does not bleed into the
  top/bottom chrome rows.
- Uses Rust let-chain syntax (`if cond && let Some(x) = ...`) for
  cleaner conditional flow at the call site.

## Tab bar ghost separator fix

- Clear each tab slot with an empty Paragraph before drawing the label,
  preventing separator glyphs from prior frames bleeding through when
  tab labels shift or resize.

## Analytics screen improvements

- Change `last_refresh_tick` from `u64` (initialized to 0) to
  `Option<u64>` (initialized to None). This ensures the very first
  `tick()` call always triggers a refresh cycle, regardless of the
  initial tick_count value. Previously, if tick_count started at 0,
  the subtraction `0 - 0 = 0 < REFRESH_INTERVAL_TICKS` was true and
  no refresh occurred until REFRESH_INTERVAL_TICKS had elapsed.
- Clamp `selected` index to `cards.len() - 1` in `view()` to prevent
  out-of-bounds access when the feed shrinks between frames.
- Switch empty-state text from a raw `&str` with `\n` to structured
  `Text::from_lines()` with `WrapMode::Word` for correct line breaking
  on narrow terminals.
- Added test `first_tick_triggers_refresh_cycle`.

## Threads screen artifact clearing

- Clear interior cells of both the thread list and thread detail panels
  with an empty Paragraph at the start of each render pass, preventing
  stale tree/border glyph artifacts from previous layouts persisting
  when content changes size or structure.

## Timeline formatting

- Reformat a closure in the commit loading path for better readability
  (no behavioral change).

## Dashboard test updates

- Updated `panel_budget_heights_match_terminal_classes` assertions to
  match the new reduced heights.
- Updated `main_layout_*` test calls to pass the new parameters.
- Added `main_layout_hides_footer_when_disabled` test.
- Added `frame_text()` test helper to extract rendered text from a Frame.
- Added `dashboard_empty_event_log_renders_guidance` test.
- Added `dashboard_filtered_empty_event_log_renders_filter_hint` test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
